_doc: Manual DM ↔ DLD aliases — override the auto fuzzy-matcher in build_curated_polygons.py. Two use cases: (1) force a DLD area_name_en match when fuzzy score is too low (Palm Jumeirah, Palm Deira); (2) override the polygon's display name where DM's admin spelling differs from the user-facing marketing name (Burj Khalifa → 'Downtown Dubai'). Aliases here always win over the fuzzy match.

aliases._comment: 44k tx hidden by fuzzy score 0.71 — biggest single fix in this file
Marketing alias: DLD admin area = Burj Khalifa, user-facing = Downtown Dubai
International City phase 1 — DLD's admin = Al Warsan First. dld_area_name_en required because the build_*_map.py CASE keys off the DLD spelling, not DM.
Admin name Al Hebiah First — all 24k tx are master_project='Motor City'. Display the marketing name; geometry stays DM admin (Motor City covers ~all of Al Hebiah First).
Al Yelayiss 2 admin → all 25k tx are TOWN SQUARE (no remainder worth surfacing). DM spells it 'AL YALAYIS 2' (no 'e' in middle).
Madinat Hind 4 admin → all 16k tx are DAMAC HILLS 2 (no remainder worth surfacing).

_unsure_skipped: AL THANYAH SECOND — fuzzy says 'Al Nahda Second' but they're likely different
OUD AL MUTEENA → Al Muteena — these may be separate Deira neighbourhoods
AL MURAR — DLD has only 'Al-Murar Qadeem' (59) / 'Al-Murar Jadeed' (29); skipping till verified
AL HATHMAH → AL Athbah — different places
MEREIYEEL, AL O'SHOOSH, AL WOHOOSH, HEFAIR, MARGAB, ENKHALI — peripheral, ≤50 tx if anything
